_comment.name: AVAS DTC Codes grabbed from Diagbox FDB. ECUTYPE union: AVAS, AVAS_GEN2. Conflicting labels resolved by majority vote across ECUTYPEs.

B11A8.name: Reverse gear information received via the high speed CAN 2

B1400.name: Supply voltage of the pedestrian horn ECU

B199E.name: No communication with the dynamic stability control ECU on the High Speed CAN 6

U0046.name: Pedestrian horn ECU not communicating on the high speed CAN 2

U0115.name: Communication with the engine management ECU on the high speed CAN 2

U0141.name: Communication with the built-in systems interface on the high speed CAN 2

U1153.name: Communication with the ESP ECU on the high speed CAN 2

U1213.name: Information received from the ESP ECU via the high speed CAN 2

U1707.name: Communication with the built-in systems interface VSM on the high speed CAN 6

U1FC3.name: Pedestrian horn ECU not communicating on the high speed CAN 6

U1FC4.name: No communication with the pedestrian horn on the high speed CAN 6

U1FC5.name: No communication on the high speed CAN 6 with the built-in systems interface
